content.thinking: Let me find the GTK theme configuration in this codebase.

content.text: The GTK theme is set to Catppuccin but only for `gtk.theme` (GTK3). The warning says `gtk.gtk4.theme` now defaults to `null` instead of inheriting from `gtk.theme`. Since there's an active theme configured, I should explicitly set `gtk.gtk4.theme = null` to adopt the new default (GTK4 apps typically use `libadwaita` and don't respect GTK3 themes anyway).

content.content: The file /tmp/klaus-sessions/cosmo/20260324-1858-89fa/home/workstation.nix has been updated successfully.

lines: +    gtk4.theme = null; # GTK4 apps use libadwaita; don't inherit the GTK3 theme

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix gtk.gtk4.theme deprecation warning in home-manager

Explicitly set gtk.gtk4.theme = null to adopt the new default behavior
in home-manager 26.05+. GTK4 apps use libadwaita and don't respect
GTK3 themes, so inheriting the Catppuccin GTK3 theme was unnecessary.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Fix gtk.gtk4.theme deprecation warning" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Explicitly set `gtk.gtk4.theme = null` in home-manager GTK config to silence the deprecation warning introduced in home-manager 26.05
- GTK4 apps use libadwaita and don't respect GTK3 themes, so the new default (not inheriting from `gtk.theme`) is the correct behavior

## Test plan
- [x] `nix fmt` — no formatting changes needed
- [x] `nix flake check` — all configurations and checks pass
- [ ] Verify `nixos-rebuild switch` no longer emits the `gtk.gtk4.theme` deprecation warning

Run: 20260324-1858-89fa
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/380

The fix adds `gtk.gtk4.theme = null;` to `home/workstation.nix:47`. This adopts the new home-manager 26.05 default where GTK4 theme config is independent of GTK3. Since GTK4 apps use libadwaita and ignore GTK3 themes like Catppuccin anyway, `null` is the correct choice.
